productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Double Truffle Jays - .5g Pack - Isodope - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Isodope supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
